purpose: Machine-readable boundary for frontend, runtime, compiler, and equivalence-method lanes considered by the research-v3 artifact.

lanes.artifact_binding: Included in research-v3-equivalence engine summaries and rule witnesses.
lanes.claim_boundary: Deterministic local execution is checked in lockstep for the selected .tvm program and max_steps.

lanes.artifact_binding: Included in research-v3-equivalence engine summaries and rule witnesses.
lanes.claim_boundary: Native interpreter execution is checked in lockstep for the selected .tvm program and max_steps.

lanes.artifact_binding: Included in research-v3-equivalence engine summaries and rule witnesses when the burn-model feature is enabled.
lanes.claim_boundary: Burn execution is checked in lockstep for the selected .tvm program and max_steps.

lanes.artifact_binding: Included in research-v3-equivalence engine summaries and rule witnesses when the onnx-export feature is enabled.
lanes.claim_boundary: The exported ONNX/Tract execution is checked in lockstep for the selected .tvm program and max_steps.
This artifact does not ingest, hash, or execute torch.export ExportedProgram graphs.
This artifact does not execute ExecuTorch programs or compare ExecuTorch stateful runtime traces.
This artifact does not export, import, hash, or execute StableHLO modules.
This artifact does not compile or execute IREE modules.
This artifact does not lower ONNX through ONNX-MLIR or compare native-code outputs.
This artifact does not compile or execute TVM artifacts.

lanes.role: future decode scheduling and prefix-cache semantics reference
lanes.claim_boundary: This artifact does not ingest vLLM graphs, KV-cache block traces, or prefix-cache schedules.

lanes.role: future decode scheduling and prefix-cache semantics reference
lanes.claim_boundary: This artifact does not ingest SGLang runtime traces, prefix-cache schedules, or prefill/decode disaggregation traces.

lanes.role: future e-graph and rewrite-validation method candidate
lanes.artifact_binding: No artifact binding in research-v3-equivalence beyond explicit non-claim limitations.
lanes.claim_boundary: This artifact does not run equality saturation, infer rewrite rules, perform SMT validation, or run randomized opaque-kernel testing.

global_non_claims: No torch.export ingestion or ExportedProgram hashing is implemented.
No ExecuTorch runtime execution is implemented.
No StableHLO, IREE, ONNX-MLIR, or TVM compiler-runtime lane is implemented.
No vLLM or SGLang decode-scheduler trace is implemented.
No egg/Emerge-style e-graph saturation, SMT rewrite validation, or randomized opaque-kernel testing is implemented.
